regime.label: RISK_ON_TRENDING
regime.explanation: SPY in confirmed uptrend and 3/3 macro checks risk-on — full idea generation.

signals.name: SPY range check
signals.rule: ranging if < 8% and no MA alignment

ideas.name: Revvity
ideas.thesis: Revvity — pullback to value in Health Care (sector rank #1), relative strength top 47% of candidates, flow confirming.
ideas.entry_type: At market (price already inside ±1% of POC)

risks.text: Extended 11% above anchored VWAP — heavy chase risk; wait for the limit level, do not buy at market.
Stop sits 10.0% below entry (~2.7 ATR), below anchored VWAP.
Reward/risk of 2.62 is close to the 2.5 floor — any slippage on entry meaningfully degrades the trade.

execution: Entry — At market (price already inside ±1% of POC). Working level: 112.48.
Stop — 101.28 (10.0% risk, ~2.7 ATR), placed below anchored VWAP. Structural, never percentage-based.
Target — 141.88 (measured move (value-area width projected)); reward/risk 2.6.
Free-flow — at 123.68 (+1R) sell half; the remainder then rides at breakeven-or-better even if stopped.
Invalidation — idea is void on a daily close below the stop reference or if the weekly regime turns RISK_OFF.
